name: Simplicity Holding Limited
summary: Simplicity Holding Limited, an investment holding company, operates casual dining full service restaurants in Hong Kong. It also engages in the property investment activities. As of March 31, 2020, the company operated 5 Marsino restaurants, 4 Grand Avenue restaurants, and 3 Baba Nyonya restaurants. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong. Simplicity Holding Limited is a subsidiary of Marvel Jumbo Limited.
